Index.title: Explore your city
Index.description: A modern, visually engaging city guide platform.

Events.no_events_scheduled: No events scheduled for this date.

Home.hero_sub: Uncover hidden gems, authentic street food, and rich history with our curated local guide.
Home.spots_desc: Discover where the locals go, from historic temples to bustling night markets.
Home.why_title: Experience the Heart of the Lower North
Home.why_body: Phitsanulok blends centuries of history with a thriving modern lifestyle. Walk beside the Nan River, taste legendary boat noodles, and celebrate festivals that have shaped this region for generations.
Home.feat_expertise_desc: Hand-picked spots vetted by residents who know every corner of the city.
Home.feat_food_desc: From boat noodles to hidden rooftop bars — the real Phitsanulok food scene.
Home.feat_events_desc: Stay up-to-date on temple fairs, markets, and community gatherings.
